flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Cuyamaca College are 23% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($32.4k vs $42.3k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Cuyamaca College rose 41% between 2007 and 2010 ($2.6k → $3.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Cuyamaca College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.9k → $11.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Cuyamaca College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6% → 0.0%).
